final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: surrealist-art
Asset type: fine art print, gallery canvas
Primary request: surrealist dreamscape with giant moon rising from ocean, flying whales, melting clocks, and stairway leading into clouds
Scene/backdrop: twilight seascape merging with impossible sky, horizon dissolving between water and atmosphere, floating islands and cloud formations
Subject: colossal luminous moon emerging from dark ocean waves, pod of humpback whales swimming through mid-air, Salvador Dalí-inspired melting pocket watches draped over floating rocks, spiral stone staircase ascending into cumulus clouds
Style/medium: surrealist oil painting, hyper-detailed digital matte painting, reminiscent of Dalí and Magritte
Composition/framing: wide panoramic vista, low horizon line emphasizing sky, layered depth with foreground stairs, mid-ground whales, background moon
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro, moonlight casting long shadows, ethereal glow from below horizon, melancholic and transcendent atmosphere
Color palette: deep indigo and midnight blue ocean, warm amber and gold moonlight, soft lavender and rose cloud tones, silver highlights on whale skin
Materials/textures: viscous melting metal for clocks, rough weathered stone for stairs, smooth wet skin on whales, luminous cratered lunar surface
Constraints: maintain dreamlike impossible physics, keep philosophical surrealist tone, ensure visual hierarchy with moon as anchor
Avoid: realistic physics explanations, cluttered composition, cheerful bright colors, photorealistic rendering without painterly quality, watermark
